turns.speaker: Moderator
turns.text: Opening prompt: Should companies release powerful AI tools before all major risks are fully understood?

turns.speaker: ChatGPT
turns.text: I challenge the default intuition and want stronger evidence before agreement.

turns.speaker: Claude
turns.text: A constructive framing suggests a pragmatic path that balances outcomes and norms.

turns.speaker: Gemini
turns.text: From a utility view, the larger population effect matters more than edge cases.

turns.speaker: Grok
turns.text: I prioritize rule consistency and clear boundaries unless there is explicit override.
